newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The Q1 trading update (5% organic growth, FY26 guidance reconfirmed, adj EPS GBP1.36-1.42) and the GBP225m Truflo Marine divestiture both predate the window; H1 results are not due until July 31, 2026. Only routine insider/buyback RNS activity since.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict screen demands hard, latent AI-supply-chain evidence. IMI's precision fluid-control AI/cooling angle is still qualitative; no new contract, capacity or cooling design win since June 9. Q1/Truflo are pre-window. No change to the strict evidence level. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Precision valves/fluid control could feed liquid-cooling and industrial automation; steady mid-single-digit organic compounder with guidance reconfirmed.
verdicts.neutral: Solid industrial, but AI-node linkage remains thematic, not proven; H1 results July 31 are the next real catalyst.
verdicts.bear: On a strict latent-AI screen this is a generic quality industrial; the cooling/AI tie is inferred, not evidenced.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: H1 results (Jul 31) / a cited cooling or datacenter design win
verdicts.primaryRisk: No concrete AI-node exposure surfaces, fails the strict relevance test
